rounds: The 6am necklace purchase without deliberating — they didn't even get a word in. The painted toes on a Saturday — same deal, joy police showed up late and found nothing to work with. But Dante had to write himself a note to remember that man exists, which means the joy police are still winning the narrative even when they're losing the moments.
pattern: They're losing the actions but winning the story you tell about them afterward.
focus: Do one visible gay thing this week and don't explain it to yourself after.
